115036.description_en_long: Iidasan is a 431-meter peak in Mashiki, Kamimashiki District, Kumamoto Prefecture, and one of the Kumamoto Hyakumeizan. Its neat, bowl-like silhouette inspired a folk tale in which it lost a height contest with Mount Kinpo, and the Heian-era Jorakuji temple stands on its slopes; the summit park overlooks the Kumamoto Plain and Mount Fugen.
